assertionResults.observation: Public issue #30 records PR #40 exact head 764487b955e08a5c4831ab9b7437ce75c6831a03 with canonical and mismatched pair and hook fixtures, zero-wallet-call blockers, and focused browser coverage; PR #50 run 29184758002 later revalidated the cumulative suites. The recorded checks directly support this assertion: Factory lookup resolves the exact displayed pair address for the reviewed token X, token Y, and bin step.

Public issue #30 records PR #40 exact head 764487b955e08a5c4831ab9b7437ce75c6831a03 with canonical and mismatched pair and hook fixtures, zero-wallet-call blockers, and focused browser coverage; PR #50 run 29184758002 later revalidated the cumulative suites.
